task_completion.description: Verify the main stepped cylindrical body (base and grip) of the control knob is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 3D viewport for a stepped cylindrical shape consisting of a wider base and a narrower grip on top. The FreeCAD Model tree should show 'Pad' features or a 'Revolution' feature creating this geometry.

task_completion.description: Verify the D-shaft mounting socket is created on the bottom face.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 3D viewport (specifically the bottom face of the wider base) for a D-shaped hole (a circle with one flat side). The Model tree should show a 'Pocket' feature corresponding to this cut.

task_completion.description: Verify the position indicator groove is created on the top face of the grip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 3D viewport (top face of the narrower grip) for a small, shallow rectangular cut or groove. The Model tree should show an additional 'Pocket' feature.

task_completion.description: Verify a fillet is applied to the top circular edge of the grip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 3D viewport to see if the top outer edge of the narrower grip is rounded (filleted) rather than a sharp 90-degree angle. The Model tree should explicitly list a 'Fillet' feature.

task_completion.description: Verify the model is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the FreeCAD window title bar, the active document tab, or the root node in the Model tree. It should display 'control_knob' or 'control_knob.FCStd'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the FreeCAD graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window should be visible with active toolbars, panels, and a 3D viewport, indicating manual or macro-driven GUI interaction rather than purely running a background script.

integrity.description: Verify the model was constructed using native CAD operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Model tree should show a sequence of parametric operations (e.g., Sketches, Pads, Pockets, Fillets) rather than a single imported solid or mesh object.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply copy or download a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check any visible terminal windows to ensure there are no commands like 'wget', 'curl', or 'cp' used to place a pre-existing 'control_knob.FCStd' file into the target directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The control knob has a total bounding box of 25x25x17 mm. The base is 25mm diameter x 5mm height, and the grip is 15mm diameter x 12mm height. The D-shaft socket is located on the bottom face (6mm diameter with a flat cut, 10mm deep). The indicator groove is located on the top face (1.5x6x1mm). The top edge of the grip has a 1mm fillet. The FreeCAD Model tree must contain Pad, Pocket, and Fillet operations. Expected filename: control_knob.FCStd.
